% Main results table
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\caption{MURU-BENCH baseline results across simulated model tiers. Accuracy@CI measures whether the model's point estimate falls within the ground truth confidence interval. ECE measures calibration error. Overconfidence rate measures the fraction of wrong answers with confidence $>0.7$.}
\label{tab:main_results}
\begin{tabular}{lccccc}
\toprule
\textbf{Model} & \textbf{Acc@CI} & \textbf{ECE}$\downarrow$ & \textbf{OvConf}$\downarrow$ & \textbf{FwMatch} & \textbf{$n$} \\
\midrule
  Random Baseline & 7.3% & 0.515 & 36.2% & 33.9% & 301 \\

  Competent Model & 49.2% & 0.239 & 21.6% & 67.1% & 301 \\
  Strong Model & 60.8% & 0.178 & 20.3% & 83.7% & 301 \\
  Expert Model & 77.1% & 0.183 & 9.6% & 89.0% & 301 \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}
